title: Basket Carts
description: A mod that allows you to put baskets into minecarts!
body:
A BTA mod that allows you to put baskets into minecarts
**Note:** Only works in singleplayer!

## Features

- Put baskets into minecarts
- Minecarts with baskets can collect items
- Empty minecart with basket with right-clicking
- Put a basket into a minecart by carrying the basket block and right-clicking on the minecart

## Dependencies

- [Raywire 1.0.4](https://github.com/Apollointhehouse/raywire)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin 1.11.0](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric-language-kotlin)
